title: LifeSmart Human Presence Sensor(Radar Detector, ZigBee) MSA201 Z
description:
Work with Smart Station,the detection range is a positive circle, regardless of "long and short sides", the installation point is simpler, and the stability is improved! Sensing range (sensitivity) 0~100% adjustable in ten steps! Support changing the delay time, 30S~30min eight gears adjustable! Smaller size, ceiling flush support 55 holes! Support CE, UKCA certification by default, worry-free export, quality assurance!
Adapter: AC 100-240V | Packaging: English | EAN: 6932046203869 | HS code: 8526109090
